name: Easy Red Beans and Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Smoked sausage link (cut into 1/2 inch slices)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook sausage over low heat for 5-8 minutes.
2. Add onion, green pepper, and garlic; sauté until tender.
3. Drain if necessary.
4. Add beans, tomatoes, and seasonings; simmer, uncovered, for 20 minutes.
5. Serve over rice.
